holdings.infoBox: SPYH is an equity ETF with a total of 493 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.90%, Apple at 6.71%, Microsoft at 4.59%, Amazon.com at 3.69%, and Alphabet at 3.31%.

overview.description: The NEOS S&P 500 Hedged Equity Income ETF (SPYH) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund aims for tax-efficient, high monthly income with some downside protection by actively investing in stocks and options on the S&P 500 Index. The fund employs a put spread collar that uses S&P 500 index options contracts. SPYH was launched on Apr 2, 2025 and is issued by Neos.
